title: Teardrop massacre
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Citation}} {{Battle |prev=[[Evacuation of Yavin]][[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] features the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] as Vader's "brand-new flagship". According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the construction of the ship was completed at the time of the [[Evacuation of Yavin]]. |conc= |next=[[Skirmish on Drunost]][[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] |image= |name=Teardrop massacre |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' (39:9 GrS)''[[Choices of One]]'' places the events of [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] six months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places in 35:3 GrS. |place=[[City on the hills]], [[Teardrop]] |result=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] victory |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |side3=[[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]] |side4= |commanders1=*[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]] *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]] *[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Colf]] *Lieutenant [[Natrom]] |commanders2=*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] **[[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *[[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] *3 [[Dropship/Legends|Dropships]] |forces2=*1 [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] **[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] |forces3=Some [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2=None |casual3=All |casual4= |civilian=An entire town }} {{Quote|It was like something out of the Clone Wars. The whole town-everyone. Slaughtered where they stood.|[[Taxtro Grave]]|}} The '''Teardrop massacre''' occurred in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. An entire [[City on the hills|town]] was devastated by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. ==Background== The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] suspected a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell of being on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teardrop]], and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] had been ordered to destroy the Rebel ships with no mercy. ==Skirmish with pirates== {{Quote|Many thanks, Captain. Glad to see the Empire is taking this pirate problem seriously.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Ozzel]]|}} By the time the ship had arrived there, the Rebels had already evacuated. The last of the ships to leave Teardrop before the Imperials landed was the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. The transport was carrying the last of the technicians and equipment needing evacuation from the planet. The crew included [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. [[File:Reprisal2.jpg|thumb|left|260px|The [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']].]] The ''Millennium Falcon'' was leaving the planet when it was attacked by [[Pirate/Legends|Pirate]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Solo and Skywalker managed to destroy a large amount but they were surpassed by the number. Ironically, they were eventually rescued by the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] of the ''Reprisal''. Expecting to find Rebels fleeing Teardrop, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]] was tricked by Solo who presented the ''Millennium Falcon'' as a civilian ship and insisted to access the planet. Ozzel ordered him to leave the planet and the Rebels immediately did it. ==The massacre== {{Quote|Sir, something's happening in town.|[[Korlo Brightwater]], to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Natrom]]|}} The ship's [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] officer, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Drelfin]], ordered [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] into a town and had them fire on civilians, with aliens first, with the intent of blaming it on Rebel agitators within the town's populace. Stormtroopers like [[Daric LaRone]] were split up into groups and sent into the city. Stormtrooper snipers such as [[Taxtro Grave]] were assigned to rooftop duty. This massacre resulted in the casualties of an entire town full of unarmed civilians. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|I suppose there could have been Rebel activity in one of the sections of town I didn't see.''"
"''Of course there could have been. And since none of us could see everything, everyone can persuade himself that's what happened. Typical ISB foggery.|Daric LaRone and Taxtro Grave|}} As a result of the massacre, stormtrooper Daric LaRone later killed Major Drelfin on the ''Reprisal''. He escaped the ship in a stolen ISB transport along with four other stormtroopers: the future [[Hand of Judgment]]. ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Evacuation}} {{Interlang |de=Scharmützel von Teardrop#legends }} [[Category:Battles in the Shelsha sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Genocides and massacres]]
